skills.name: autoplan
skills.description: Auto-review pipeline — runs CEO, design, and eng reviews sequentially with auto-decisions

skills.name: benchmark
skills.description: Performance regression detection — establishes baselines, compares before/after, tracks trends

skills.name: canary
skills.description: Post-deploy canary monitoring — watches for console errors, performance regressions, page failures

skills.name: careful
skills.description: Safety guardrails — warns before rm -rf, DROP TABLE, force-push, and other destructive commands

skills.name: checkpoint
skills.description: Save and resume working state — captures git state, decisions, remaining work for cross-session continuity

skills.name: codex
skills.description: OpenAI Codex CLI wrapper — code review, adversarial challenge, and consult modes

skills.name: connect-chrome
skills.description: Launch real Chrome controlled by gstack with Side Panel extension for live activity feed

skills.name: cso
skills.description: Chief Security Officer mode — infrastructure-first security audit with OWASP, STRIDE, and supply chain scanning

skills.name: design-consultation
skills.description: Design system creation — researches landscape, proposes typography/color/layout, generates preview pages

skills.name: design-review
skills.description: Designer's eye QA — finds visual inconsistency, spacing issues, AI slop patterns, fixes iteratively

skills.name: document-release
skills.description: Post-ship documentation update — syncs README, ARCHITECTURE, CHANGELOG, and TODOS to match what shipped

skills.name: freeze
skills.description: Restrict file edits to a specific directory for the session

skills.name: gstack-upgrade
skills.description: Upgrade gstack to the latest version — detects install type, upgrades, shows what's new

skills.name: guard
skills.description: Full safety mode — combines /careful (destructive command warnings) with /freeze (directory-scoped edits)

skills.name: health
skills.description: Code quality dashboard — wraps project tools (tsc, biome, knip, tests), computes 0-10 score, tracks trends

skills.name: investigate
skills.description: Systematic debugging with root cause investigation — investigate, analyze, hypothesize, implement

skills.name: land-and-deploy
skills.description: Land and deploy workflow — merges PR, waits for CI, verifies production health via canary checks

skills.name: learn
skills.description: Manage project learnings — review, search, prune, and export what gstack learned across sessions

skills.name: office-hours
skills.description: YC-style brainstorming — problem diagnosis, premise challenge, design doc output

skills.name: plan-ceo-review
skills.description: CEO/founder-mode plan review — rethink the problem, find the 10-star product, challenge premises

skills.name: plan-design-review
skills.description: Designer's eye plan review — rates each design dimension 0-10, explains what would make it a 10

skills.name: plan-eng-review
skills.description: Eng manager-mode plan review — architecture, data flow, edge cases, test coverage, performance

skills.name: qa
skills.description: Systematically QA test a web application and fix bugs found — runs QA, fixes iteratively, commits atomically

skills.name: qa-only
skills.description: Report-only QA testing — structured report with health score, screenshots, repro steps, never fixes

skills.name: retro
skills.description: Weekly engineering retrospective with commit analysis, work patterns, and trend tracking

skills.name: review
skills.description: Pre-landing PR review — analyzes diff for SQL safety, trust boundary violations, and structural issues

skills.name: setup-browser-cookies
skills.description: Import cookies from real Chromium browser into headless browse session for authenticated QA testing

skills.name: setup-deploy
skills.description: Configure deployment settings — detects platform, production URL, health checks, writes config to CLAUDE.md

skills.name: ship
skills.description: Ship workflow — merge base, run tests, review diff, bump VERSION, update CHANGELOG, commit, push, create PR

skills.name: unfreeze
skills.description: Clear freeze boundary — allow edits to all directories again

skills.name: skill-status
skills.description: Reports on the skill catalog — counts by portability, checks profile match, verifies upstream versions

skills.name: project-contract
skills.description: Write or tighten a CLAUDE.md for any repo — inspects the repo, generates a contract with build/test commands and architecture boundaries

skills.name: repo-bootstrap
skills.description: Onboard any repo for Claude Code work — maps the repo, creates CLAUDE.md, runs verification, checks domain knowledge

skills.name: domain-context
skills.description: Load or capture domain knowledge — reads from ~/.claude/knowledge/ for architecture notes, glossaries, and deep dives

skills.name: sync-audit
skills.description: Compares the home-setup repo against installed ~/.claude/ state — reports differences with fix commands
